# The Advancement of Learning

*[Francis Bacon](../philosophers/bacon.md) · 1605*

A plea for the dignity and advancement of learning, in which Bacon maps the whole of human knowledge, marks its gaps, and defends a programme of inquiry turned toward utility. The work paves the way for the great reform of the sciences completed by the *[Novum Organum](../works/novum-organum-bacon.md)*.
